title: Late approval of Non-governmental Entity Funding Request
doc_html:
Rule 8.4. Late approval of Non-governmental Entity Funding Request

           Pursuant to Joint Rule No. 17 of the Joint Rules of the Senate and House of Representatives, Non-governmental Entity Funding Requests submitted after November first and not approved at a meeting of the Joint Legislative Committee on the Budget or the Joint Legislative Committee on Capital Outlay prior to the last day for introduction of a matter intended to have the effect of law by either house of the legislature, may be approved by the chairman of the Senate Committee on Finance for requests with respect to bills over which the committee has jurisdiction and by the chairman of the Senate Committee on Revenue and Fiscal Affairs for requests with respect to which that committee has jurisdiction.

           SR 12 of 2008, 1st ES

Rule 8.4. Late approval of Non-governmental Entity Funding Request
Pursuant to Joint Rule No. 17 of the Joint Rules of the Senate and House of
Representatives, Non-governmental Entity Funding Requests submitted after November
first and not approved at a meeting of the Joint Legislative Committee on the Budget or
the Joint Legislative Committee on Capital Outlay prior to the last day for introduction of
a matter intended to have the effect of law by either house of the legislature, may be
approved by the chairman of the Senate Committee on Finance for requests with respect
to bills over which the committee has jurisdiction and by the chairman of the Senate
Committee on Revenue and Fiscal Affairs for requests with respect to which that
committee has jurisdiction.
SR 12 of 2008, 1
